title: How China is reducing inflation, and America is stoking it
section_path: How China is reducing inflation, and America is stoking it
section_path_text: How China is reducing inflation, and America is stoking it
summary:
Main
The three things investors need to know this week:
US inflation is coming down, but marginally. Meanwhile, services inflation remains a concern. This is why the Fed is still expressing scepticism about the sustainability of deflationary forces and refrains from putting a time-stamp on rate cuts.
